title: flytomaru optimization
description: Flytomaru Optimization - Modpacks for comfortable gameplay with friends and without unnecessary mods.
body: Flytomau optimization is an optimization for the game so that you can play with new versions without any lag! These modpacks are made for weak computers! There's nothing extra, just optimization, and you can add or remove anything you want! I'm also releasing new modpacks for new versions!
